name: Clarixa – Python Task
postCreateCommand: code --install-extension ./clarixa-0.1.0.vsix --force 2>/dev/null || true; pip install -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || true; curl -sf "https://api.clarixa.org/api/extension/claim-launch?githubUser=${GITHUB_USER}" -o CLARIXA_TASK.json 2>/dev/null && echo 'Clarixa task loaded.' || echo 'No pending Clarixa task — use Setup Task command in VS Code.'
